use_cases: Primary and secondary call-to-action buttons in web applications
Form submission and action triggers with multiple visual variants
Interactive UI controls in SaaS dashboards and admin interfaces
Navigation and link-style buttons with hover state feedback
ai_summary: A flexible React button component built with Radix UI Slot for composition and class-variance-authority for variant management. Features multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes with consistent hover, focus, and disabled states. Designed as a foundational UI primitive for web applications requiring accessible, styled button elements.
